title: Permission mode selector component for agent chat interface
purpose: Provides a dropdown UI element for selecting different permission modes in an agent chat interface. Used to control how an agent interacts with the system based on permission level.
module_context: Exports a React functional component that renders a select dropdown with permission mode options. The component accepts value, onChange, and disabled props to control its behavior and appearance.

steps.content: Render a select dropdown element with specified styling classes.
Set the dropdown value to the provided permission mode value.
Attach an event handler to process changes in the dropdown selection.
Disable the dropdown if the disabled prop is true.
Populate the dropdown with four permission mode options: supervised, accept-edits, plan, and bypass.
